title: Shoreline v5
tagline: The next generation — rebuilt with a modern API-first architecture.
description: Shoreline v5 is a ground-up rebuild of the original platform, transitioning from a monolithic Flask app to a clean REST API backend with a decoupled frontend, improved auth, and a fully redesigned data model.
story: After shipping Shoreline and watching real operators use it, the technical debt became clear. v5 isn't a patch — it's a rethink. The goal is a platform that can scale to multi-location restaurant groups without rewiring everything.
forWho: The same restaurant operators as Shoreline, but designed to grow from a single location to a regional chain without a rewrite.

detailedSpecs.architecture: Decoupled REST API (Flask) + headless frontend. JWT-based auth replacing sessions. Multi-tenant schema design with org-scoped data.
keyPatterns: CI/CD pipeline with automated migration runs
